questionHtml: Outline one method that the researchers could have used to measure heart rate in this study.
markschemeHtml:
a. state the method/equipment 
eg take the pulse.

b. how method/equipment works 
eg count beats per minute. 

c. during exercise on treadmill/bicycle
OWTTE.
